MODULE: cosmos.integration.email.mailbox_filter
FILE: cosmos/integration/email/mailbox_filter.py (780 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Mailbox Filter

"Good news, everyone! I can sort your email faster than you can say 'spam'!"

Universal mailbox filtering that works across email providers.

CLASSES:
- FilterConditionType(Enum): Types of filter conditions.
- FilterActionType(Enum): Types of filter actions.
- FilterCondition: A single filter condition.
  Methods: def evaluate(self, email: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool
- FilterAction: A single filter action.
- FilterRule: A complete filter rule with conditions and actions.
  Methods: def matches(self, email: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'FilterRule'
- MailboxFilter: Universal mailbox filtering engine.

Works with Office 365, Google Workspace, or

  Methods: def create_rule(self, name: str, conditions: List[Dict[str, Any]], actions: List[Dict[str, Any]], de
  Methods: def update_rule(self, rule_id: str, **updates) -> Optional[FilterRule]
  Methods: def delete_rule(self, rule_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_rule(self, rule_id: str) -> Optional[FilterRule]

  Methods: def enable_rule(self, rule_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def disable_rule(self, rule_id: str) -> bool
